description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of night dress from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsShiny blue satin night dress with a V-neckline and broad shoulder straps with bow detailingMaterial and CareSatinHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
